# Extendio

> Extendio is an owner-run hair-accessories brand from Alicante, Spain (founded and run by Juri Vaal).
> Products: detangling hairbrushes with a cat-ear spiral design (body with 29% bio-based content from
> wheat-straw fibre, certified to ASTM D6866 by Beta Analytic), bamboo cotton swabs (bamboo stem,
> 100% cotton tips), claw clips made from bio-polypropylene with wheat-straw fibre, and a salon trolley
> for professionals. Sold exclusively via Amazon (amazon.de, amazon.es, amazon.co.uk) — the website is
> a catalogue that links to the Amazon listings; there is no own checkout.

Key facts:
- Extendio is an EU trade mark (EUIPO No. 019082088).
- The cat-ear brush design is a registered EU design (No. 015112996-0001/-0002) — the original is only from Extendio.
- Wholesale/B2B enquiries: extendio.es@gmail.com or WhatsApp +34 634 22 38 98.

## Pages
- [Home (DE/ES/EN)](https://extendio.es/): products, materials, salon & wholesale information
- [Legal notice](https://extendio.es/legal.html)
- [Privacy policy](https://extendio.es/privacy.html)
- [Cookie policy](https://extendio.es/cookies.html)
